name: Web - Slow HTTP Attack (Slowloris)
description: Detects Slow HTTP attacks (Slowloris, Slow POST) where attackers send HTTP requests very slowly to exhaust server connections. Identified by many long-duration connections from a single IP with incomplete requests and high 408/499 status codes.
search: index=web (sourcetype=nginx_access OR sourcetype=apache_access) (status=408 OR status=499 OR status=503) | bucket _time span=5m | stats count as slow_count, dc(uri) as unique_uris, values(status) as statuses, values(method) as methods by src_ip, host, _time | where slow_count >= 20 | eval severity=case( slow_count >= 100, "high", slow_count >= 50, "medium", 1==1, "low") | eval attack_type=case( like(mvjoin(statuses,","), "%408%"), "Slowloris / Request Timeout", like(mvjoin(statuses,","), "%499%"), "Client Disconnect (Nginx slow)", like(mvjoin(statuses,","), "%503%"), "Service Unavailable - possible DoS") | eval mitre="T1499.001" | table _time, src_ip, host, slow_count, unique_uris, attack_type, statuses, severity, mitre
author: SOC Team
